name: Ebos Group Limited
analysis: EBO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 55% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$16.7200, stop A$15.9885, target A$19.2000 (3.39:1) — then trail it.
